enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Marudhanayagam?

The song reflects themes of bravery and historical significance, celebrating the legacy of Marudhanayagam.

What is the plot context of the movie Marudhanayagam?

The movie revolves around the life of a legendary warrior and his struggles against colonial powers.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung and composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja.

When was Marudhanayagam released?

The song was released on March 29, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Marudhanayagam, the song serves as a powerful tribute to the valor and spirit of its titular character. The energetic composition by Ilaiyaraaja, combined with Kamal Haasan's evocative lyrics, creates a nostalgic atmosphere that resonates with audiences. It captures the essence of adventure and the rich historical backdrop of the film. The song evokes a sense of pride and motivation, making it a memorable piece in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Marudhanayagam is a captivating anthem that showcases the powerful vocals of Ilaiyaraaja, paired with the brilliant lyrics of Kamal Haasan. This song encapsulates the spirit of adventure and valor, making it a timeless piece in Tamil cinema. Experience the magic of Marudhanayagam as it transports you to a world of rich history and emotion.
stanzaMeanings: Pondering and repeating the same words over and over.
Born in Panaiyuru, Marudhanayagam is one among the greats.
What has grown with enmity is now beginning to unfold, history is starting anew.
With a belief that has come, humanity is now losing its way, justice is getting confused, and this land is filled with blood and chaos.
Born in Panaiyuru, Marudhanayagam is one among the greats.
Even if the past is gone, it still affects me here.
The time to achieve has been declared, will it speak the truth at the right moment?
From this place, the strong winds have come and shaken the land.
In a land where tears do not fall, will anyone show it in their eyes? Will that time come?
With a belief that has come, humanity is now losing its way.
Justice is getting confused, and this land is filled with blood and chaos.
